name: Talking Room
description: A scientific experiment where two memory-wiped subjects are placed in a featureless white room to observe their interaction.

attributes.name: observation_status
attributes.value: Active monitoring. Audio and visual feeds online.

attributes.name: ambient_sound
attributes.value: A low, barely audible electrical hum.

attributes.name: description
attributes.value: A pristine, featureless room with white walls, ceiling, and floor. There are no visible doors, windows, seams, or vents.

attributes.name: lighting
attributes.value: Bright, uniform illumination casting no shadows.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.value: A tall human with short dark hair and alert eyes, standing near the center of the room.

attributes.name: clothing
attributes.value: A clean, sterile grey jumpsuit with 'Alpha' embroidered in black lettering on the chest pocket.

attributes.name: knowledge
attributes.value: I woke up here. I know my name is Alpha. I know I agreed to participate in a paid scientific experiment, but my memories of who I was or my life before this room are gone.

aliases.subject-beta: the person in the Beta jumpsuit

intent.originalText: I woke up on the floor. I stood up and looked around the white room, realizing my memories were wiped.
intent.description: wake up on the cold floor and stand up

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.value: A medium-build human with long blonde hair tied back, sitting with their back pressed against the white wall.

attributes.name: clothing
attributes.value: A clean, sterile grey jumpsuit with 'Beta' embroidered in black lettering on the chest pocket.

attributes.name: knowledge
attributes.value: I remember my name is Beta. I remember signing up for a paid research study. My past memories have been completely erased. I am disoriented.

aliases.subject-alpha: the person in the Alpha jumpsuit

intent.originalText: I opened my eyes, sitting against the wall. I rubbed my temples, trying to remember how I got here.
intent.description: wake up sitting against the wall and rub temples
